description_long: This object consists of two rectangular sheets, one of which is partially peeled back, revealing a glossy, carbon-fiber-like black surface. The main sheet contains six evenly spaced, circular blue tablets or pills, each with a slightly domed top and a scored line across the center, suggesting they are breakable. The blue tablets are embedded in the black sheet, which appears to function as a blister pack, holding the medicine securely in place. The second sheet, partially lifted, is likely the protective backing that can be peeled away to access the tablets. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a high-contrast color scheme of black and blue. No visible branding or text is present on the packaging.
description: A modern black blister pack containing six blue, domed tablets with a partially peeled backing. The pack has a glossy, carbon-fiber-like finish and no visible branding.
description_view_0: The view shows both the main blister pack with six blue tablets and the partially peeled black backing, highlighting the glossy surface and the arrangement of the tablets.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the separation between the blister pack and the backing, with the backing sheet visibly curling upward and the blue tablets clearly displayed.
description_view_2: The view focuses on the glossy black surface and the blue tablets, with the backing sheet partially lifted, revealing the underside of the pack.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the blister pack and the backing sheet from above, with the blue tablets and the curvature of the backing sheet both visible.
